implementationFrozen.note: No contract/runtime rework unless a concrete defect is discovered during external closure

melegaSwapV2.role: LB contracts, runtime observe/decide/intent, deployment validator, activation gates

treasuryRuntime.role: Treasury LB settlement ingestion, reconciliation, accounting acknowledgement

kerlSigning.origin: embedded in MelegaSwapV2 apps/web/src/lib/kerl-signing-gate (no separate sibling repo under Projects/)
kerlSigning.role: KMS_HSM adapter currently MISSING; HOT_SIGNER rejected for LB

relayInfra.role: Permissionless submission service — must be provisioned without inventing a repository name

blockers.dependency: Non-exportable secp256k1 KMS/HSM signing authority for ExecutionIntent V1 digests only
blockers.requiredArtifact: Public Ethereum authority address + provider class + non-exportability verdict + service policy summary (no secrets)
blockers.repository: Infra KMS project + kerl-signing-gate adapter (MelegaSwapV2) + Authorizer deploy inputs
blockers.repositoryOwner: meleganza (MelegaSwapV2 for Authorizer binding; KMS account owner for key)
blockers.requiredAction: Provision KMS/HSM key; derive address; bind service identity; forbid HOT_SIGNER/private key; publish address into LiquidityBuildingV1.inputs.json
blockers.acceptanceEvidence: AUTONOMOUS_AUTHORITY_PRODUCTION_READY in deployment inputs; nonExportable=true; address nonzero
blockers.verificationMethod: validate-lb-v1-inputs.mjs PASS on authority fields; Authorizer.signingAuthority() == published address after deploy
blockers.activationImpact: Blocks signing, Authorizer deploy, Factory deploy, LB011/LB014 cycle

blockers.dependency: Production KMS DER→Ethereum normalization validated against LB006 Authorizer
blockers.requiredArtifact: Production (or production-authority) signature validation report: digest, recovered address, Authorizer validateExecutionIntent PASS; NON-EXECUTABLE intent only
blockers.repository: MelegaSwapV2 (normalization module already present) + KMS signer service
blockers.requiredAction: Sign non-executable Intent digest with production authority; run normalizeKmsDerSignature; call Authorizer validation on fork or deployed Authorizer
blockers.verificationMethod: Unit + Authorizer eth_call/fork test with production-format 65-byte sig; wrong-signer reject
blockers.implementationNote: DER/low-s/v module already in apps/web/src/lib/liquidity-building-runtime/kms-signature-normalization.ts — not an implementation gap

blockers.dependency: Permissionless gas-funded relay that submits opaque signed calldata only
blockers.requiredArtifact: Relay service URL/health + capability matrix (submit/monitor/retry/replacement/duplicate) + proof relayer address irrelevant to economics
blockers.repository: NOT_IDENTIFIED_AS_GIT_REPO — must be provisioned; do not invent repo name
blockers.repositoryOwner: TBD after relay service origin is verified
blockers.requiredAction: Deploy relay; wire LB runtime DisabledLiquidityBuildingRelay → production adapter; expose health READY
blockers.acceptanceEvidence: RELAY_READY; health endpoint; duplicate/idempotency tests green
blockers.verificationMethod: Two relayer identities submit identical signed intent → identical Program economic outcome; modified calldata fails
blockers.activationImpact: Blocks permissionless submission of signed intents

blockers.dependency: Canonical chain-56 Treasury LB fee receiver (contract, non-EOA, Treasury/D99 custody)
blockers.requiredArtifact: Address + bytecode hash + role proof + Runtime binding + custody/withdrawal model
blockers.repository: meleganza/melega-kiri-treasury-runtime (or Treasury contracts repo once origin verified) — NOT MelegaSwapV2 DEX app authority
blockers.requiredAction: Implement/bind TreasuryLiquidityBuildingReceiverV1 (or equivalent); reject Vault/EIP-7702/EOA; publish address for Sink constructor
blockers.acceptanceEvidence: PRODUCTION_BINDING_IDENTIFIED; Sink treasuryReceiver matches; no human withdrawal path
blockers.verificationMethod: On-chain code.length>0; interface check; LB006 Sink constructor accept; Runtime config points to same address
blockers.activationImpact: Blocks Fee Sink deploy and all fee settlement

blockers.dependency: Treasury Runtime ingestion of LiquidityBuildingFeeSettled + related events
blockers.requiredAction: Implement ingestion validating chain/Factory/Sink/receiver/Program/executionId/amount/finality; deploy with chainId 56 (leave development/smartdrop-only)
blockers.acceptanceEvidence: runtimeIngestion.status=OPERATIONAL; health shows chainId 56 + LB capability
blockers.verificationMethod: Fixture finalized Sink event → ACCOUNTED; duplicate idempotency; wrong Sink REJECTED
blockers.activationImpact: Blocks economic completion of any LB cycle

blockers.dependency: Runtime reconciliation distinguishing executionId, settlement receipt, Runtime acknowledgement ID
blockers.requiredArtifact: End-to-end ACCOUNTED record with three distinct IDs + idempotency key chainId+sink+settlementKey+txHash+logIndex
blockers.requiredAction: Complete reconciliation state machine through ACCOUNTED; no tx-hash-only dedupe
blockers.acceptanceEvidence: Finalized LB settlement reaches ACCOUNTED with acknowledgement referencing settlement receipt
blockers.verificationMethod: Integration test suite LB008 handoff §28 items 1–25
blockers.activationImpact: Blocks LB011/LB014 success criteria for Treasury evidence

blockers.dependency: Founder-ratified production quote floors for enabled assets
blockers.requiredArtifact: quotePolicies[] in LiquidityBuildingV1.inputs.json with ratificationStatus RATIFIED or DEPLOYED
blockers.requiredAction: Ratify WBNB proposed floors (and any enabled asset); populate quotePolicies; never mark CALCULATED as RATIFIED
blockers.acceptanceEvidence: At least one enabled asset RATIFIED; validator accepts quote floors
blockers.verificationMethod: validate-lb-v1-inputs.mjs; Factory constructor acceptance with ratified policy on deploy
blockers.activationImpact: Blocks Factory production deploy and WBNB activation

blockers.dependency: Pinned on-chain stable gas conversion for USDT/USDC if activated
blockers.requiredArtifact: gasConversionMode PinnedOnChainPair|PinnedTreasurySource + pair/source + reserve floors + staleness/drift bounds — or explicit NOT_ACTIVE
blockers.requiredAction: Either provision sufficient Melega WBNB/stable reserves and pin path, or keep USDT/USDC NOT_ACTIVE (allowed)
blockers.acceptanceEvidence: Per-asset ACTIVE only with verified path; otherwise NotActive without claiming activation
blockers.verificationMethod: On-chain reserve probe; policy validator rejects HTTP/relayer rates
blockers.activationImpact: Does not block WBNB-only activation if WBNB ratified and other gates pass

blockers.requiredArtifact: Ops report: reorg observations, RPC/indexer/Treasury finality policies vs depth 15
blockers.repository: MelegaSwapV2 indexer constants (REORG_SAFETY_BLOCKS=12) + Treasury Runtime + ops docs
blockers.requiredAction: Certify FINALITY_15_CONFIRMED or document FINALITY_INCREASE_REQUIRED with new immutable candidate; do not silently reduce
blockers.verificationMethod: Written evidence pack cited from activation-gate-final; indexer/Treasury configs aligned

derivedGatesStillBlocked: Deployment validator PASS (depends all blocking fields)
nextMissionIfAllClosed: LB014 — First Controlled Mainnet Liquidity Building Cycle
nextMissionIfBlocked: Execute only the specific external closure identified by blocker ID (do not start another generic implementation mission)
